query:
SELECT 
  a.id,
  DATE_FORMAT(a.weekStartDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as week_start,
  a.timeBlocks,
  DATE_FORMAT(a.confirmedAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as confirmed_at,
  DATE_FORMAT(a.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created_at
FROM workers w
JOIN availability a ON w.id = a.workerId
WHERE w.name LIKE '%伊娜%'
ORDER BY a.weekStartDate DESC, a.createdAt DESC;

  DATE_FORMAT(a.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created_at
FROM workers w
JOIN availability a ON w.id = a.workerId
WHERE w.name LIKE '%伊娜%'
ORDER BY a.weekStartDate DESC, a.createdAt DESC;
